checks.label: Host identity
checks.command: hostname -f 2>/dev/null || hostname

checks.label: Operating system
checks.command: if [ -r /etc/os-release ]; then awk -F= '$1 == "NAME" && name == "" { name = substr($0, index($0, "=") + 1) } $1 == "PRETTY_NAME" { value = substr($0, index($0, "=") + 1); gsub(/^"|"$/, "", value); print value; printed = 1; exit } END { if (!printed) { gsub(/^"|"$/, "", name); print (name != "" ? name : "Linux") } }' /etc/os-release; else uname -sr; fi

checks.label: Uptime and load
checks.command: uptime 2>/dev/null || { cat /proc/uptime 2>/dev/null; cat /proc/loadavg 2>/dev/null; }

checks.label: Memory
checks.command: if command -v free >/dev/null 2>&1; then free -m; else cat /proc/meminfo 2>/dev/null | head -n 20; fi

checks.label: Root filesystem
checks.command: df -P /

checks.label: Failed systemd units
checks.command: if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then systemctl --failed --no-legend --no-pager 2>&1; else printf 'systemd unavailable\n'; fi

checks.label: Monitoring processes
checks.command: ps -eo pid=,ppid=,user=,stat=,etime=,comm= | awk 'BEGIN { IGNORECASE=1 } /icinga|nagios|naemon|nrpe|thruk/ { print }' | head -n 200

checks.label: Listening sockets
checks.command: if command -v ss >/dev/null 2>&1; then ss -lntup 2>&1 | head -n 200; elif command -v netstat >/dev/null 2>&1; then netstat -lntup 2>&1 | head -n 200; else printf 'socket inventory unavailable\n'; fi

checks.label: Recent system errors
checks.command: if command -v journalctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then journalctl -p err -n 100 --no-pager -o short-iso 2>&1; else printf 'journal unavailable\n'; fi

checks.label: Icinga processes
checks.command: pgrep -l -f 'icinga2|icingaweb2' 2>&1

checks.label: Icinga systemd unit
checks.command: if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then systemctl show icinga2 --no-pager --property=LoadState,ActiveState,SubState,UnitFileState,MainPID,Result,NRestarts,ActiveEnterTimestamp,InactiveEnterTimestamp 2>&1; else printf 'systemd unavailable\n'; fi

checks.label: Icinga journal
checks.command: if command -v journalctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then journalctl -u icinga2 -n 120 --no-pager -o short-iso 2>&1; else printf 'journal unavailable\n'; fi

checks.label: Icinga config paths
checks.command: for path in /etc/icinga2 /etc/icinga /usr/lib/nagios/plugins /usr/lib64/nagios/plugins; do if [ -e "$path" ]; then ls -ld "$path"; fi; done

checks.label: Icinga service objects
checks.command: for path in /etc/icinga2/conf.d /etc/icinga2/zones.d; do if [ -d "$path" ]; then grep -R -n -E '(^|[[:space:]])(apply|object)[[:space:]]+Service' "$path" 2>/dev/null; fi; done | head -n 200

checks.label: Nagios processes
checks.command: pgrep -l -f 'nagios|naemon|nrpe' 2>&1

checks.label: Nagios systemd units
checks.command: if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then for unit in nagios nagios4 naemon nrpe; do printf '%s\n' "[$unit]"; systemctl show "$unit" --no-pager --property=LoadState,ActiveState,SubState,UnitFileState,MainPID,Result,NRestarts,ActiveEnterTimestamp,InactiveEnterTimestamp 2>&1; done; else printf 'systemd unavailable\n'; fi

checks.label: Nagios journal
checks.command: if command -v journalctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then journalctl -u nagios -u nagios4 -u naemon -u nrpe -n 120 --no-pager -o short-iso 2>&1; else printf 'journal unavailable\n'; fi

checks.label: Nagios config paths
checks.command: for path in /etc/nagios /etc/nagios3 /etc/nagios4 /etc/naemon /usr/local/nagios/etc /usr/lib/nagios/plugins /usr/lib64/nagios/plugins; do if [ -e "$path" ]; then ls -ld "$path"; fi; done

checks.label: Nagios object definitions
checks.command: for path in /etc/nagios /etc/nagios3 /etc/nagios4 /etc/naemon /usr/local/nagios/etc; do if [ -d "$path" ]; then grep -R -n -E '^[[:space:]]*define[[:space:]]+(host|service)' "$path" 2>/dev/null; fi; done | head -n 200

checks.label: Middleware processes
checks.command: ps -eo pid=,ppid=,user=,stat=,etime=,comm= | awk 'BEGIN { IGNORECASE=1 } /java|jboss|wildfly|tomcat|websphere|weblogic|nginx|httpd|apache2|haproxy|rabbitmq|kafka/ { print }' | head -n 200
